creator: gouders@et.bocholt.fh-ge.de
text:
I tried to search for PRs that contain the text "exilim" in single-line fields.
When I leave the category to "any" and check "closed reports too", no matches are found.  If the category is changed to "USB" or "closed reports too" is not checked, a matching PR is found.

Fix: 

Unknown.
How-To-Repeat: Try to search the database as described above.
